ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., MID, FWD, DEF) */,
  "team" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "element" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the player's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the team's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of team A */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of team H */,
  "opponent_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing as team A */,
  "team_h_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing as team H */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the match record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_h_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_h_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "xP" REAL /* Expected points */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Bonus points system */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Clean sheets */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity */,
  "fixture" INTEGER /* Fixture */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT Index */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Own goals */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Penalties missed */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Penalties saved */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Saves */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Selected */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player was playing for */,
  "opp_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "is_home" TEXT /* Indicator whether the player's team was playing at home */,
  "opponent_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating of the opposing team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the statistics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_opp_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opp_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Transfers in */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Transfers out */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Transfer balance */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Fee paid for the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., loan, permanent) */,
  "source_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred from */,
  "destination_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the transfer record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_source_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_destination_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "user_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-player combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "selected_on" TEXT /* Date and time the player was selected by the user */,
  "captain_status" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the player is the captain of the user's team */,
  "vice_captain_status" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the player is the vice-captain of the user's team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the user-player record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the league record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)
